title: SIGSEGV in MANIFOLDjob
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT id, name FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT id, NULL FROM bar;
SELECT (created_at - toUnixTimestamp(toDateTime('1970-01-01 00:00:00'))), name FROM bar UNION ALL SELECT (created_at - toUnixTimestamp(toDateTime('1970-01-01 00:00:00'))), NULL FROM bar;
key_bug_features: selecting null values in union query
